mapper.select: SELECT sg.goal_id, sg.goal_title, sg.goal_amount, sg.start_date, sg.target_date, sg.monthly_target, sg.created_at, sg.user_id, COALESCE(SUM(gt.amount), 0) as current_amount FROM projectdb.saving_goals sg LEFT JOIN projectdb.goal_transactions gt ON sg.goal_id = gt.goal_id WHERE sg.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY sg.goal_id, sg.goal_title, sg.goal_amount, sg.start_date, sg.target_date, sg.monthly_target, sg.created_at, sg.user_id ORDER BY sg.created_at DESC

SELECT sg.goal_id, sg.goal_title, sg.goal_amount, sg.start_date, sg.target_date, sg.monthly_target, sg.created_at, sg.user_id, COALESCE(SUM(gt.amount), 0) as current_amount FROM projectdb.saving_goals sg LEFT JOIN projectdb.goal_transactions gt ON sg.goal_id = gt.goal_id WHERE sg.goal_id = #{goalId} GROUP BY sg.goal_id, sg.goal_title, sg.goal_amount, sg.start_date, sg.target_date, sg.monthly_target, sg.created_at, sg.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projectdb.saving_goals (goal_title, goal_amount, start_date, target_date, monthly_target, user_id) VALUES (#{goalTitle}, #{goalAmount}, #{startDate}, #{targetDate}, #{monthlyTarget}, #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE projectdb.saving_goals SET goal_title = #{goalTitle}, goal_amount = #{goalAmount}, start_date = #{startDate}, target_date = #{targetDate}, monthly_target = #{monthlyTarget} WHERE goal_id = #{goalId}
mapper.select: SELECT gt.goal_tx_id, gt.amount, gt.goal_id, gt.tx_id, t.tx_datetime, t.memo FROM projectdb.goal_transactions gt LEFT JOIN projectdb.transactions t ON gt.tx_id = t.tx_id WHERE gt.goal_id = #{goalId} ORDER BY t.tx_datetime DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projectdb.goal_transactions (amount, goal_id, tx_id) VALUES (#{amount}, #{goalId}, #{txId})
